rulings.Case Title: OLUSOJI FANOIKI VS. 1081-1087 MISSISSIPPI STREET ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice On Motion And Defendants Motion To Lift Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 22, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT BRIAN REED, 1081-1087 MISSISSIPPI STREET HOMEOWNERS' Notice On Motion And Defendants Motion To Lift Preliminary Injunction DENIED. The Court admonishes the Plaintiff and orders Plaintiff to comply with the Court's Preliminary Injunction order fully and on time. For any future assessments, Plaintiff shall (1) file a declaration within 5 days of assessment being made indicating the payment due date; and (2) file a declaration that payment was made within 5 days of timely tender. If there are any other outstanding assessments, in addition to recent paid Water Leak Assessment, Defendant shall inform the Court at the time of the hearing and Plaintiff shall make the payments no later than 5:00 p.m. on March 22, 2019. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOO MING LAI VS. MARIA NGUYEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 22, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT MARIA NGUYEN MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Not a proper motion to address the issues that are being raised. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOO MING LAI VS. MARIA NGUYEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 22, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT MARIA NGUYEN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address why an OSC: Re Contempt should not issue as to Phil Foster for submitting a Request for Judicial Notice claiming that the documents attached are "true and correct copies" of Court's own records, without verifying that these documents appear in the Court's records. (The Court at this time will not address any allegations of forgery). Demurrer is continued to May 20, 2019 pending the resolution of the Motion to Vacate Judgment. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOO MING LAI VS. MARIA NGUYEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 22, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT MARIA NGUYEN MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. This Delta motion is improper. Borsuk v. Appellate Division of Sup. Ct. (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. =(501/REQ)
